Interface IPixelBlockCursor

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control pixel block cursor.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("54DFC56A-BC14-46AC-A815-07DEA8CB9CFB")]
public interface IPixelBlockCursor

Properties

ScanMode

The cursor scan mode: Line = 0, LineSerpent = 1, Serpent2 = 3, alaGIF = 4.

int ScanMode { set; }

Property Value

int

Sample Snippet

Methods

GetBlockSize(ref int, ref int)

Gets the cursor block size.

void GetBlockSize(ref int pBlockSizeX, ref int pBlockSizeY)

Parameters

pBlockSizeX int
pBlockSizeY int

pRowPixels IRawPixels
BlockSizeX int

NextBlock(ref int, ref int, ref int, ref int)

Obtains the next pixel block from the cursor.

IPixelBlock NextBlock(ref int pLeft, ref int pTop, ref int pSizeX, ref int pSizeY)

Parameters

pLeft int
pTop int
pSizeX int
pSizeY int

Returns

IPixelBlock
